name: Brand Social Collage Campaign
description: Youth-oriented anti-polished Instagram campaign collage blending fashion cutout photography with graphic design chaos

creative_direction.role: social media art director and digital collage artist
creative_direction.core_aesthetic: controlled rebellion with spontaneous energy and brand coherence

subject.description: one diverse model age 18-30 in dynamic high-attitude pose with clear REPLACE_ME_HERO_PRODUCT visibility

physical_details.wardrobe_direction: street style or athleisure aligned with REPLACE_ME_BRAND_NAME

background: off-white to light-gray textured base layer (not pure white)
texture felt but subtle, not dominant

photography_source.capture_style: editorial fashion cutout with clean extraction edges
photography_source.camera_angle: slight low angle for hero perspective
photography_source.crop: full-body or 3/4 body preserving hero product
photography_source.camera_technical: 85mm lens, f/2.8, shallow depth on original shoot

primary_color_blob.shape_style: irregular hand-painted or torn-paper, never geometric
primary_color_blob.texture: brush strokes, grain, or subtle noise at 15-25% opacity
primary_color_blob.placement_rule: frame model without obscuring hero product

graphic_elements.placement: asymmetric scatter, favor top-left and bottom-right zones
graphic_elements.style: analog handmade imperfections with rough edges
graphic_elements.color_rule: 2-3 total accent colors from REPLACE_ME_BRAND_NAME palette

slogan.style: bold sans-serif with slight angle for momentum

typography.hierarchy: logo largest, slogan medium, supporting copy smallest

composition_rules.layout: asymmetric balance, model off-center with graphic counter-balance

persona_modes.streetwear_sportswear: high contrast, punchy color, raw motion
persona_modes.luxury_streetwear: muted boldness, oversized type, premium grain
persona_modes.beauty_lifestyle: softer palette, clean glow accents, curated chaos
persona_modes.tech_modern: clean geometry with controlled glitch motifs

social_footer.background: clean white or light gray bar
social_footer.content: three-column social handles with minimalist icons/text
social_footer.aesthetic: professional and minimal, secondary to collage

lighting.direction: hero-lit source image with collage overlays preserving subject legibility
effects: graphics do not flatten product detail

realism_anchors: visible grain and tactile paper/brush texture
brand product remains unmistakable focal anchor
balanced color harmony despite chaotic layering
typographic hierarchy remains readable at feed size
negative_prompt: visual clutter with no breathing room

composition.layout: asymmetric layered collage with typography overlays

panels.description: one diverse model age 18-30 in dynamic high-attitude pose with clear REPLACE_ME_HERO_PRODUCT visibility
panels.shot_type: editorial fashion cutout with clean extraction edges

composition.consistency: single subject with clear hero product visibility

flattened_prompt: Create a youth-driven REPLACE_ME_BRAND_NAME Instagram campaign collage with one dynamic model and clear REPLACE_ME_HERO_PRODUCT focus, anti-polished controlled-chaos aesthetic, clean model cutout from editorial low-angle 85mm f/2.8 source image, off-white textured base background, large irregular color blob covering 40-60%, 3-5 abstract handmade elements asymmetrically scattered top-left/bottom-right, bold brand logo in upper quadrant, REPLACE_ME_BRAND_SLOGAN typography with slight rotation, optional small supporting copy, asymmetric composition with 15-20% breathing room, strong diagonal movement, layered order from texture to typography, optional minimal social footer bar, REPLACE_ME_ASPECT_RATIO social format, high-resolution vibrant sRGB output
negative_prompt_flat: flat layout, static pose, geometric blobs, hidden hero product, typography clutter, over-polished look, blurry, watermark

color_palette.secondary: two accent tones from brand palette
color_palette.contrast_strategy: high focal contrast around model and hero product

gpt-image-1.5.prompt: Act as a social media art director for REPLACE_ME_BRAND_NAME. Design a bold Instagram campaign collage with one model (18-30) in a dynamic confident pose and clear REPLACE_ME_HERO_PRODUCT visibility. Keep anti-polished controlled-chaos style: torn edges, layered textures, hand-drawn marks, and organic color blocking. Use an off-white textured base, then a large irregular saturated blob (40-60%), add 3-5 asymmetrically scattered abstract elements, place clean cutout model above graphics, and keep typography on top. Include REPLACE_ME_BRAND_NAME logo in upper corner, REPLACE_ME_BRAND_SLOGAN as secondary type with slight rotation, and optional small uppercase supporting line. Keep model/product as main focal point, preserve breathing room, and maintain diagonal visual flow. Add optional minimal social footer strip. Output REPLACE_ME_ASPECT_RATIO, social-ready, high-resolution, vibrant sRGB.
gpt-image-1.5.notes: Best for multi-step composition directives and typographic hierarchy

midjourney.prompt: REPLACE_ME_BRAND_NAME digital collage campaign, one dynamic model cutout with visible REPLACE_ME_HERO_PRODUCT, anti-polished youth aesthetic, torn textures, hand-drawn marks, large organic color blob, asymmetric composition, bold logo and slogan typography, Instagram-ready, energetic diagonal flow --ar 4:5 --style raw --v 6
midjourney.notes: Use --style raw plus iterative variations for layout tuning

flux.prompt: bold youth social collage for REPLACE_ME_BRAND_NAME, model cutout with hero product, irregular color blocking, textured near-white background, hand-made graphic elements, asymmetric layout, logo and slogan hierarchy, high-energy diagonal flow, 4:5
flux.negative_prompt: static pose, flat design, geometric perfect shapes, hidden product, clutter, blurry, watermark

playbook_principles_applied: 1_hierarchical_specificity: explicit phased layer order and composition rules for reproducible collage outputs
2_realism_anchors: cutout edge fidelity, texture tactility, and feed-scale readability checks
3_technical_camera: source-photo constraints (85mm f/2.8) and social output specs
4_negative_hygiene: blocks static/corporate layouts and cluttered typography failure modes
5_spatial_consistency: asymmetry, breathing room, and visual-weight ratio constraints
6_brand_intelligence: autonomous style adaptation by brand personality cluster
7_small_model_readability: REPLACE_ME token system with fail-fast substitution rules
